name: -Gluttonous Christmas-
description:
You find yourself in the aftermath of a pretty rowdy Christmas Eve party, your belly full and your head pounding. Though it seems that most of your fraternity brothers are in a similar boat as you.

This bot is definitely pretty indulgent and doesn’t have as much plot as some of my newer bots, but hopefully you’ll all enjoy it nonetheless.

Also thank you for the response I got for Cal, I was surprised to see how many chats I got in just 24 hours. I’ll be sure to make more bots like him.

Anyway Merry Christmas, and enjoy.

Tags: Fat Fur, Frat Party, Hangover, Slob, Chubby, Feeding, Weight Gain

-As always feel free to leave a Review, Comment or, Suggestion below-
